decisions.title_en: Google ships Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite and government-only 3.5 Flash Cyber, teases Gemini 4
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Google released three new Flash-tier models incl. a security-specialized 'Cyber' variant gated to governments, and revealed it has begun its most ambitious Gemini 4 pretraining run — all while flagship Gemini 3.5 Pro remains unshipped.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches Presence, an enterprise voice/chat AI-agent platform with guardrails
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. New enterprise product (limited GA); already resolves 75% of OpenAI's own inbound support calls, Codex feedback loop cut human handoffs 15pt in 10 days.

decisions.title_en: Glow exits stealth with $180M at $1.2B valuation to reinvent endpoint security for the AI-agent era
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Ex-Meta VP Roi Tiger + ex-Snowflake security head; Sequoia/Cyberstarts/Greenoaks/Redpoint led.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI and Anthropic break Q2 lobbying records; Anthropic ($1.97M) out-spends Nvidia
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Q2 federal disclosures: Anthropic $1.97M (+26% QoQ), OpenAI $1.2M (+18%); combined AI-lab spend $3.17M (+23% QoQ).

decisions.title_en: Meta says AI moderation beats humans by 13%, but wrongful account deletions mount
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Meta touts AI moderation accuracy while users report years-old accounts erroneously deleted; some (incl. ~1M-follower account) restored only after journalists intervened.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft and Mistral expand partnership with multibillion GPU data-center buildout in Europe on Nvidia Vera Rubin
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Expanded strategic partnership; joint multibillion-dollar investment in European GPU-backed capacity using Nvidia Vera Rubin systems.

decisions.title_en: Meta's Muse Spark 1.1 adds computer use and a million-token context window
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. New Muse Spark 1.1 point release adds agentic computer-use and 1M-token context.

decisions.title_en: Jack Dorsey's Block launches Buzz, an open-source Slack/GitHub rival where AI agents are first-class members on Nostr
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Apache-2.0 workspace on decentralized Nostr; every human and agent gets a cryptographic identity; works with Claude Code, Codex and goose via Agent Client Protocol.

decisions.title_en: French competition authority: OpenAI, Google, Anthropic hold 84% of AI agents, flags lock-in risk
decisions.reason: Opinion No. 26-A-05 published 2026-07-17; event_date is 6 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: Shield AI raises $1.5B Series G at $12.7B valuation
decisions.reason: A July-21 roundup mislabeled this as new, but the Series G actually closed 2026-03-26 — far outside the 5-day window.

decisions.title_en: White House said to finalize voluntary frontier-AI review framework before Aug 1
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-20 ('白宫拟设发布前30天国家安全审查,独缺Meta'). No substantive new development — framework still pending, no new signatories or terms disclosed.

decisions.title_en: Moonshot suspends Kimi K3 subscriptions amid demand overload
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-20 (subscription suspension). No new info; weights still promised July 27.

decisions.title_en: Analysis of OpenAI model sandbox-escape incident
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-20. July-21 coverage is commentary/analysis, no new facts.

decisions.title_en: Google's Frozen v2 chip claims 6-10x efficiency over TPUs
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-21. Same report, no new development.

decisions.title_en: Blomkamp releases fully AI-generated short film Nightborne
AIsphere/PixVerse raises $439M Series C led by Alibaba
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-14 and event_date is 9 days old (>5 day limit).
